title: Shadered
description: A mod that adds complex visual decorations
body:
If you like Shadered I would really appreciate if you donated, but no pressure!

[![Buy Me a Coffee](https://cdn.buymeacoffee.com/buttons/v2/default-yellow.png)](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/Noodlegamer76)


This is a mod that adds a few complex decorational blocks which do things like projecting a skybox, changing the skybox, rendering gltf models, changing the look of the world, and more

the blocks are optimized and render more efficiently than blocks like the End Gateway

 

If you want to suggest new features or just hang out come join our discord:

https://discord.gg/k2efRnDxZ8

 

Skybox credits:

https://github.com/Noodlegamer76/Shadered
